requirements.desc: Remove Documents section from formatText() output
requirements.note: The entire Documents section block (header, sync.status branches) is removed from formatText() in report.js

requirements.desc: Clarify Metrics labels: docs read, src read, issue-log
requirements.note: Metrics line changed from 'docs ${m.docsRead}  src ${m.srcRead}  Q&A ${m.question}  issues ${m.issueLog}' to 'docs read ${m.docsRead}  src read ${m.srcRead}  Q&A ${m.question}  issue-log ${m.issueLog}'

requirements.desc: Issue Log shows only reason per entry (no resolution suffix)
requirements.note: Entry rendering changed from '[step] reason -> resolution' to '[step] reason' — the conditional resolution suffix is removed

requirements.desc: Tests section always rendered even when data.tests is null
requirements.note: pushSection for Tests is now called unconditionally; else branch adds '    -' placeholder when data.tests is falsy

unplanned.change: Extracted pushSection() helper function to deduplicate the repeated blank-line + title + divider triple across all sections (Implementation, Retro, Metrics, Tests, Issue Log)
Replaced empty Q:/A: template placeholder with a meaningful 'No open clarification questions' note — cleanup of dead documentation

summary.notes: All 4 requirements are fully satisfied. Two unplanned changes are present: the pushSection helper extraction (prompted by review proposal #4, which was in-scope as an approved review item) and the qa.md placeholder cleanup (review proposal #5). Both are low-risk improvements consistent with project coding rules. No requirement gaps or partial implementations detected.
